description: Kafka cluster compromise — unauthorized consumer group accessing customer data streams across multiple tenants
notes: Attacker created rogue consumer group using stolen Kafka credentials. Accessed real-time data streams for 4 financial and 2 healthcare customers. HIPAA and PCI notification required.

description: Unauthorized access to new GPU inference cluster — SSH key from pre-migration period still valid
notes: SSH key was from the legacy ML platform. Key migration process during the platform migration missed this key. Inference cluster deployed Aug 2025.

description: Anomalous data egress from new Flink processing cluster — investigation confirmed authorized replication to customer's backup endpoint
notes: False alarm. Customer's automated backup was configured on the new Flink cluster without security team notification.

description: Data pipeline misconfiguration — healthcare customer data routed to retail customer's analytics dashboard for 23 minutes
notes: Cross-sector data leak. Healthcare patient data (de-identified but with re-identification risk) visible in retail customer dashboard. HIPAA notification filed. Root cause: tenant routing configuration error in new Kubernetes-based pipeline orchestrator deployed September 2025.

description: Ransomware on data ingestion gateway — Clop variant encrypted inbound data buffer
notes: Data ingestion gateway processes streams for all customer sectors. Buffer contained ~4 hours of unprocessed data. Recovered from upstream replay. Entry vector: compromised container image in new K8s-based ingestion pipeline deployed October 2025.

description: Unauthorized access attempt on new Grafana monitoring dashboard — default admin credentials not changed after deployment
notes: Grafana deployed as part of new observability stack in November 2025. Default admin/admin credentials used for 3 weeks until external scanner found it. No data access — monitoring dashboards only.

description: Employee accessed customer analytics without business justification — DLP flagged
notes: Handled via HR. Read-only access to aggregate dashboards.
